app.name: Droidex
app.tagline: The community bible for Star Wars: Droid Tycoon

auth.signInBenefit: Your progress syncs across all your devices.
auth.noProvider: Online saving is coming soon. In the meantime, your progress is kept on this device.

droid.flawlessHint: The Flawless unlock is permanent and survives Super Rebirth.
droid.unverifiedHint: Extrapolated figure or from a secondary source. Confirm in game.
droid.galacticNoData: No stats have been published for the Galactic tier so far.

perk.bb8: Doubles the Upgrade Chips earned when selling a droid
perk.misterBones: Higher max HP, and credits earned on eliminations

rebirth.title: Rebirths
rebirth.tagline: Progress through the tiers and unlock new possibilities.
rebirth.missing: You're {count} droid short | You're {count} droids short
rebirth.placementWarning: Droids must be physically placed in your base — owning them in the Droidex is not enough.
rebirth.grantsList: Credit and XP multiplier, base and lounge slots, offline credits, weapon access
rebirth.cycleHint: Requirements change with every Super Rebirth and loop over 4 cycles.
rebirth.undocumented: Requirements not published for this cycle.
rebirth.sameAsCycles: Requirements identical to cycle {cycles} — that is what our sources show; confirm in game.
rebirth.singleSource: The requirements for all four cycles come from community trackers (srbcontrol, cross-checked with two other sources), without official confirmation. Check in game before committing resources.

superRebirth.title: Super Rebirths
superRebirth.loses: Base, all droids, credits, rebirth rank, pickaxe level, blueprints and Upgrade Chips
superRebirth.keeps: Your Droidex content, your crafting level, your cosmetics, and your unlocked Flawless and Iconic droids

shop.title: Nova Shop
shop.subtitle: Spend your Nova Crystals
shop.incomplete: The Nova Shop catalogue is only partially documented by the community. Missing prices are flagged.

confidence.single-source: Price reported by a single source.

shop.noteLevels: Costs are PER LEVEL, not cumulative: going from level 2 to level 5 costs the sum of levels 3, 4 and 5.
shop.noteOneTime: Items with the ONE-TIME badge can only be bought once.
shop.noteUnverified: Some circulating values (free, < 15k) are unverified or estimated.

guide.title: Guide
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know
guide.specialtyBonus: +10% credits if the droid sits in a slot of its own type
guide.collectionBonus: +25% credits if all 25 slots are filled with different droids
guide.flawlessBonus: Your first Flawless of each type adds +0.01× to base earnings, up to +0.51× across the 51 craftable types.
guide.sandcrawlerBeskar: Guaranteed Beskar every {minutes} minutes, one per player in the lobby
guide.sandcrawlerMythic: Guaranteed Mythic blueprint every hour at XX:{minute}, one per player

common.syncFailed: Couldn't save — your changes were not stored.

disclaimer.title: About the data
disclaimer.community: All stats come from community trackers and wikis. No exhaustive official source exists. Check requirements in game before committing to a rebirth.
disclaimer.rights: {starWars} and {fortnite} are trademarks of {epicGames} and {lucasfilm}. This community site is neither affiliated with nor endorsed by them.

timers.title: Sandcrawler timers
timers.hint: Tap when you see a spawn
timers.beskarPerPlayer: Beskar spawns once per player in the lobby.
timers.rainbowRemoved: The 5-minute Rainbow timer was removed in v1.22.

advisor.title: Best next purchase
advisor.hint: The highest-earning droids your budget allows.
advisor.creditsOnly: Tier upgrades are paid in Upgrade Chips, not credits — they are not listed here.
advisor.allOwned: You already own everything with published stats.

missions.title: Missions
missions.subtitle: Pads, zones and rewards
missions.dailyReset: {count} quests per day, reset every {hours} h
missions.infoAstromech: Only an ASTROMECH droid on the terminal shortens the mission. Anything else leaves it at base time.
missions.infoScaling: For mission pads, both rarity AND tier count. For World Missions, only rarity counts since v1.18.
missions.infoTwoSystems: The two systems follow different rules.

home.subtitle: Your droid collection
home.tagline: Collect, upgrade and grow your income with every unique droid.

profile.clearWarning: Permanently erases your collection, rebirth level and purchases — on this device and on your account.

legal.title: Legal notice
legal.subtitle: Please read before using this site.
legal.noRights: This site is a fan project with no rights and no standing whatsoever. It is not official, not affiliated with, not endorsed by and not supported by Epic Games, Lucasfilm, The Walt Disney Company or the island creators. Nothing here speaks on their behalf.
legal.nonProfit: This site exists so players can help each other, and nothing else. It earns nothing: no advertising, no subscriptions, no paid content, no donations, no data resale. Nobody makes money here — not us, not anyone.
legal.trademarks: Star Wars, Fortnite and every name, character and logo mentioned are trademarks of their respective owners. They appear solely to identify the game this site is about, with no claim of any kind.
legal.images: Droid artwork consists of captures from the game interface. It belongs to its rights holders; we hold neither the rights nor a licence. It is reproduced for identification only, in a community, strictly non-commercial context.
legal.data: The figures come from player measurements and community wikis that sometimes contradict each other. They are not official data: they may be wrong or out of date. Always check in game before committing a resource.
legal.takedown: Created and shared as a non-commercial hobby by {email}. Any rights holder who wants content removed may request it at this address: it will be taken down, no argument.

onboarding.title: Where are you at?
onboarding.subtitle: Three numbers so the planner starts from your save, not from scratch.
onboarding.editableLater: All of this stays editable at any time from the Rebirths page and the shop.

install.title: Install Droidex
install.body: Add Droidex to your home screen: instant launch, full screen, and offline access.
install.iosSteps: Tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

reset.title: Erase my progress
reset.intro: Your progress exists only in this browser. No account keeps it, no bin recovers it: this erasure is permanent.
reset.exportHint: You can export your progress from the Profile page first, then import it back later.
reset.lastCall: Everything will be erased immediately, with no way back.

footer.tagline: Interactive community database for the droids of Star Wars and Fortnite.

feat.communityDesc: Built and maintained for the community
feat.verifiedDesc: Cross-referenced across several sources; without an official source, errors remain possible.
feat.updatesDesc: New info and stats added continuously

footer.creator: Creator
footer.maintainedBy: Created and shared as a hobby by

legalPage.title: Legal notice
legalPage.intro: The following sets out what this site is, where its data comes from, and how it is shared.
legalPage.editorBody: This site is created and shared as a non-commercial hobby by {email}.
legalPage.sourcesIntro: This site's data is aggregated from community sources — no exhaustive official source exists. Thanks to their authors. Here are the ones used:
legalPage.privacyBody: Your progress is stored only in your browser. No account is required, no personal data is collected or transmitted, and there is no advertising tracking.

sync.title: Sync
sync.subtitle: Transfer your progress to another device with a code — no account, no email.
sync.codeHint: Valid for 30 days. Enter this code on your other device.

installPage.title: Install the app
installPage.intro: Add Droidex to your home screen to open it like a real app: full screen, instant launch, and access even offline. Nothing to download from a store — it all happens from your browser.
installPage.instantDesc: One icon on your home screen, the app opens in a tap.
installPage.offlineDesc: Your collection stays available without a connection.
installPage.fullscreenDesc: No browser bar, just like a native app.
installPage.iosS1: Tap the Share button (the square with an upward arrow) at the bottom of the screen.
installPage.iosS2: Scroll down, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.
installPage.iosS3: Confirm with “Add”: the Droidex icon appears on your home screen.
installPage.iosNote: Installation only works from Safari. On Chrome or Firefox for iOS, open this page in Safari first.
installPage.androidLead: From Chrome, installation is a single tap.
installPage.androidS1: Open the browser menu (the three dots, top right).
installPage.androidS2: Choose “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”.
installPage.androidReady: One-tap install is available: press the button.
installPage.androidUnavailable: Automatic install isn't offered here (already installed, unsupported browser, or criteria not yet met). Follow the steps below.
